city.zh: 安大略省 多伦多

majorTuition.zh:
多大国际生学费按专业差异巨大：
• 人文社科：C$42,680/年
• 理科：C$47,230/年
• 商学(Rotman)：C$57,020/年
• 工程/CS：C$62,250/年
majorTuition.en:
U of T international tuition varies dramatically by program:
• Arts/Humanities: C$42,680/yr
• Science: C$47,230/yr
• Commerce (Rotman): C$57,020/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$62,250/yr

desc.zh: 加拿大排名第一的综合性研究型大学，位于多伦多市中心。三大校区（圣乔治、密西沙加、士嘉堡）提供700+本科专业，学术声誉享誉全球。
desc.en: Canada's top-ranked comprehensive research university, located in downtown Toronto. Three campuses (St. George, Mississauga, Scarborough) offer 700+ undergraduate programs with world-class academic reputation.

requirements.IB:
各专业最低IB要求不同：
• Arts & Science 文理：27-32
• Engineering 工程：38+（HL数学+物理6+）
• Computer Science 计算机：40+
• Rotman Commerce 商学：37+（HL数学6+）
• Life Science 生命科学：32+
• Architecture 建筑：30+

safetyDetail.zh: 多伦多是加拿大最大城市，整体治安良好。校园有24小时安保巡逻和蓝光紧急电话系统。市中心部分区域夜间需注意安全。
safetyDetail.en: Toronto is Canada's largest city with generally good safety. Campus has 24/7 security patrols and blue-light emergency phones.

climate.zh: 四季分明，冬季寒冷（-7°C至-1°C），常有降雪。夏季温暖宜人（20-27°C）。
climate.en: Four distinct seasons. Cold winters (-7°C to -1°C) with frequent snow. Pleasant summers (20-27°C).

visa.zh: Study Permit学习许可 → 毕业后可申请PGWP工签（最长3年）→ 通过Express Entry或安省省提名(OINP)申请永久居留(PR)。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Ontario PNP (OINP).

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$12,000-18,000/年
🏢 校外租房：市中心Studio约C$1,800-2,400/月
📍 推荐区域：Annex、Harbord Village
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$12,000-18,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Downtown studio ~C$1,800-2,400/mo
📍 Recommended: Annex, Harbord Village

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约78%，六年毕业率约85%。学术要求较高。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约89%
💼 知名雇主：五大银行、四大会计师事务所、科技公司
🌟 校友网络庞大，Bay Street金融中心就业机会丰富
employment.en:
📊 ~89% employed within 6 months
💼 Top employers: Big Five banks, Big Four accounting, tech (Google, Amazon)
🌟 Vast alumni network; proximity to Bay Street

healthcare.zh: ✅ 安省国际学生需购买UHIP，约C$756/年，覆盖基本医疗。
healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP, ~C$756/yr.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105通道
📅 截止日期：1月15日
💰 申请费：C$180
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、个人陈述、补充申请
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC Stream 105
📅 Deadline: January 15
💰 Fee: C$180
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, personal statement

city.zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省 温哥华

majorTuition.zh:
UBC国际生学费因专业不同：
• 文科：C$42,803/年
• 理科：C$47,937/年
• 商学(Sauder)：C$55,500/年
• 工程：C$59,000/年
majorTuition.en:
UBC international tuition by program:
• Arts: C$42,803/yr
• Science: C$47,937/yr
• Commerce (Sauder): C$55,500/yr
• Engineering: C$59,000/yr

desc.zh: 位于温哥华西海岸的世界顶尖公立研究型大学，校园依山傍海，被评为全球最美校园之一。Sauder商学院和工程学院享有盛誉，Co-op项目丰富。
desc.en: A world-class public research university on Vancouver's west coast, with one of the most beautiful campuses globally. Renowned Sauder School of Business and Engineering, with strong co-op programs.

requirements.IB:
各专业最低IB要求不同：
• Arts 文学：29
• Science 理学：32
• Commerce 商学（Sauder）：35+
• Engineering 工程：34+（HL数学物理6+）
• Computer Science：36+
• Kinesiology 运动科学：30

safetyDetail.zh: 温哥华多年被评为全球最宜居城市之一，治安良好。UBC校园位于半岛尽头，环境安全。
safetyDetail.en: Vancouver consistently ranked among world's most livable cities. UBC campus is on a peninsula with secure environment.

climate.zh: 温和的海洋性气候，冬季温和多雨（3-8°C），少有降雪。夏季凉爽舒适（15-22°C）。
climate.en: Mild oceanic climate. Warm, rainy winters (3-8°C) with rare snow. Cool summers (15-22°C).

visa.zh: Study Permit学习许可 → 毕业后可申请PGWP工签（最长3年）→ 通过Express Entry或BC省提名(BC PNP)申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or BC PNP.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$11,000-16,000/年
🏢 校外租房：校区周边Studio约C$1,600-2,200/月
📍 推荐区域：Wesbrook Village、Dunbar
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$11,000-16,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Near-campus studio ~C$1,600-2,200/mo
📍 Recommended: Wesbrook Village, Dunbar

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约80%，六年毕业率约87%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约90%
💼 温哥华科技产业蓬勃：Amazon、Microsoft、SAP均设有办公室
🌟 Co-op项目覆盖广泛
employment.en:
📊 ~90% employed within 6 months
💼 Vancouver tech hub: Amazon, Microsoft, SAP offices
🌟 Extensive co-op programs

healthcare.zh: ✅ BC省国际学生可加入MSP，等待期后享受基本医疗保障。学校另有补充健康保险iMED。
healthcare.en: ✅ BC international students eligible for MSP after waiting period. UBC also provides iMED supplementary insurance.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过UBC官网在线申请
📅 截止日期：1月15日
💰 申请费：C$116.25
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、Personal Profile
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via UBC website
📅 Deadline: January 15
💰 Fee: C$116.25
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, Personal Profile essay

city.zh: 魁北克省 蒙特利尔

majorTuition.zh:
McGill国际生学费因专业不同：
• 文科：C$35,000/年
• 理科：C$40,200/年
• 商学(Desautels)：C$52,000/年
• 工程/CS：C$58,000/年
majorTuition.en:
McGill international tuition by program:
• Arts: C$35,000/yr
• Science: C$40,200/yr
• Commerce (Desautels): C$52,000/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$58,000/yr

desc.zh: 加拿大最负盛名的英语授课大学之一，位于蒙特利尔市中心皇家山脚下。以医学、法学和科学研究闻名，被誉为加拿大的「哈佛」。蒙特利尔是双语城市，生活成本相对较低。
desc.en: One of Canada's most prestigious English-language universities, at the foot of Mount Royal in downtown Montreal. Renowned for medicine, law, and scientific research. Montreal is a bilingual city with relatively lower living costs.

requirements.IB:
各专业最低IB要求不同：
• Arts 文学：32
• Science 理学：36
• Engineering 工程：38+
• Commerce 商学（Desautels）：36+
• Music 音乐：32（+试镜）
• Nursing 护理：34

safetyDetail.zh: 蒙特利尔治安良好，犯罪率低于多伦多和温哥华。校园位于市中心，夜间有安保巡逻服务。
safetyDetail.en: Montreal has good safety with lower crime rates than Toronto and Vancouver. Night security patrols available.

climate.zh: 冬季漫长寒冷（-15°C至-5°C），降雪量大。夏季温暖湿润（20-26°C）。
climate.en: Long, cold winters (-15°C to -5°C) with heavy snowfall. Warm, humid summers (20-26°C).

visa.zh: Study Permit学习许可 → 毕业后可申请PGWP工签（最长3年）→ 通过Express Entry或魁省PEQ项目申请永久居留。PEQ要求法语B2。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Quebec PEQ program (requires French B2).

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一优先，约C$10,000-15,000/年
🏢 校外租房：蒙特利尔租金实惠，Studio约C$1,000-1,600/月
📍 推荐区域：Milton-Parc、Plateau
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Priority for first year, ~C$10,000-15,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Montreal affordable, studio ~C$1,000-1,600/mo
📍 Recommended: Milton-Parc, Plateau

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约82%，六年毕业率约87%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约88%
💼 蒙特利尔AI产业蓬勃（Mila研究所）、游戏产业（Ubisoft）、航空航天
🌟 校友网络全球广泛
employment.en:
📊 ~88% employed within 6 months
💼 Montreal AI hub (Mila), gaming (Ubisoft), aerospace
🌟 Extensive global alumni network

healthcare.zh: ✅ 魁省国际学生需加入RAMQ或购买学校健康保险。中国学生需购买学校保险。
healthcare.en: ✅ Quebec international students need RAMQ or university health plan. Chinese students need university insurance.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过McGill官网申请（魁省独立系统）
📅 截止日期：1月15日
💰 申请费：C$129
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、个人陈述
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via McGill website (Quebec separate system)
📅 Deadline: January 15
💰 Fee: C$129
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, personal statement

city.zh: 安大略省 汉密尔顿

majorTuition.zh:
McMaster国际生学费：
• 文科/社科：C$35,000/年
• 理科：C$39,500/年
• 商学(DeGroote)：C$48,000/年
• 工程：C$57,000/年
majorTuition.en:
McMaster international tuition:
• Arts/Social Sciences: C$35,000/yr
• Science: C$39,500/yr
• Commerce (DeGroote): C$48,000/yr
• Engineering: C$57,000/yr

desc.zh: 以创新教学方法闻名的研究型大学，其PBL（问题导向学习）教学法在全球医学教育中具有里程碑意义。健康科学、工程学实力雄厚，距多伦多仅1小时车程。
desc.en: A research university renowned for innovative teaching. Its Problem-Based Learning (PBL) approach is a landmark in global medical education. Strong in health sciences and engineering. Just 1 hour from Toronto.

safetyDetail.zh: 汉密尔顿是中型城市，校园环境安全。学校有24小时安保和免费步行护送服务。
safetyDetail.en: Hamilton is a mid-sized city with a safe campus. 24/7 security and free walk-home escort available.

climate.zh: 四季分明，冬季寒冷（-7°C至-1°C），有降雪。夏季温暖（20-27°C）。靠近安大略湖。
climate.en: Four distinct seasons. Cold winters (-7°C to -1°C) with snow. Warm summers (20-27°C). Near Lake Ontario.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或安省省提名(OINP)申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Ontario PNP (OINP).

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$9,500-14,000/年
🏢 校外租房：汉密尔顿租金实惠，Studio约C$1,100-1,500/月
📍 推荐区域：Westdale、Ainslie Wood
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$9,500-14,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Hamilton affordable, studio ~C$1,100-1,500/mo
📍 Recommended: Westdale, Ainslie Wood

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约76%，六年毕业率约84%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约87%
💼 健康科学毕业生就业前景优异
🌟 靠近多伦多，GTA就业市场可达
employment.en:
📊 ~87% employed within 6 months
💼 Health sciences grads have excellent prospects
🌟 Proximity to Toronto and GTA job market

healthcare.zh: ✅ 安省国际学生需购买UHIP，约C$756/年。校内有学生健康中心。
healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP, ~C$756/yr. On-campus Student Wellness Centre.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105通道
📅 截止日期：1月15日
💰 申请费：C$156
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩、补充申请
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC Stream 105
📅 Deadline: January 15
💰 Fee: C$156
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency, supplementary application

city.zh: 魁北克省 蒙特利尔

majorTuition.zh:
蒙特利尔大学国际生学费（法语授课）：
• 文科/社科：C$30,000/年
• 理科：C$32,000/年
• 工程：C$35,000/年
注：学费相对英语大学更实惠
majorTuition.en:
UdeM international tuition (French instruction):
• Arts/Social Sciences: C$30,000/yr
• Science: C$32,000/yr
• Engineering: C$35,000/yr
Note: More affordable than English universities

desc.zh: 加拿大最大的法语大学，人工智能研究领域全球领先（Mila实验室附属），医学和法学实力雄厚。注意：主要以法语授课。
desc.en: Canada's largest French-language university. Global leader in AI research (affiliated with Mila lab). Strong in medicine and law. Note: Primarily French instruction.

safetyDetail.zh: 校园位于皇家山北坡，环境优美安全。蒙特利尔治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Campus on the north slope of Mount Royal, beautiful and safe. Montreal has good safety.

climate.zh: 冬季漫长寒冷（-15°C至-5°C），降雪量大。夏季温暖湿润（20-26°C）。蒙特利尔地下城可避寒。
climate.en: Long, cold winters (-15°C to -5°C) with heavy snow. Warm summers (20-26°C). Montreal's underground city helps beat the cold.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或魁省PEQ项目申请永久居留。法语授课学生在PEQ中有语言优势。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Quebec PEQ. French-instruction students have advantage for PEQ.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：约C$8,000-12,000/年
🏢 校外租房：蒙特利尔租金实惠，Studio约C$1,000-1,500/月
📍 推荐区域：Côte-des-Neiges、Outremont
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: ~C$8,000-12,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Montreal affordable, studio ~C$1,000-1,500/mo
📍 Recommended: Côte-des-Neiges, Outremont

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约75%，六年毕业率约82%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约85%
💼 蒙特利尔AI产业中心、制药、游戏产业就业机会丰富
🌟 法语能力在魁省就业市场是巨大优势
employment.en:
📊 ~85% employed within 6 months
💼 Montreal AI hub, pharma, gaming opportunities
🌟 French proficiency is a major advantage in Quebec

healthcare.zh: ✅ 魁省国际学生需加入RAMQ或购买学校健康保险。法国等有互惠协议国家的学生可直接加入RAMQ。
healthcare.en: ✅ Quebec international students need RAMQ or university health insurance. Students from reciprocal countries can join RAMQ directly.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过UdeM官网申请（魁省独立系统）
📅 截止日期：2月1日
💰 申请费：C$100
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、法语能力证明（TFI/DALF）
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via UdeM website (Quebec separate system)
📅 Deadline: February 1
💰 Fee: C$100
📝 Materials: Transcripts, French proficiency (TFI/DALF)

city.zh: 阿尔伯塔省 埃德蒙顿

majorTuition.zh:
阿尔伯塔大学国际生学费：
• 文科：C$33,000/年
• 理科：C$36,500/年
• 商学：C$46,000/年
• 工程/CS：C$55,000/年
majorTuition.en:
U of Alberta international tuition:
• Arts: C$33,000/yr
• Science: C$36,500/yr
• Commerce: C$46,000/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$55,000/yr

desc.zh: 加拿大顶尖研究型大学，位于阿尔伯塔省首府。以工程学、人工智能（DeepMind联合创始人母校）、能源研究见长。阿省无省销售税，生活成本较低。
desc.en: A top Canadian research university in Alberta's capital. Renowned for engineering, AI (alma mater of DeepMind co-founder), and energy research. Alberta has no provincial sales tax, lower living costs.

safetyDetail.zh: 埃德蒙顿是安全的中型城市，校园广大且安保完善。冬季天黑较早，建议结伴出行。
safetyDetail.en: Edmonton is a safe mid-sized city with a large, well-secured campus. Early darkness in winter; travel with companions recommended.

climate.zh: 冬季极寒（-20°C至-10°C），是加拿大最冷的大学城之一。夏季凉爽宜人（15-23°C）。需准备专业防寒装备。
climate.en: Extremely cold winters (-20°C to -10°C), one of Canada's coldest university cities. Cool summers (15-23°C). Professional winter gear essential.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或阿省省提名(AINP)申请永久居留。阿省对科技和能源人才需求旺盛。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Alberta PNP (AINP). Alberta has strong demand for tech and energy talent.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一优先，约C$8,000-12,000/年
🏢 校外租房：埃德蒙顿租金低廉，Studio约C$900-1,300/月
📍 推荐区域：Garneau、Strathcona
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Priority for first year, ~C$8,000-12,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Edmonton low rents, studio ~C$900-1,300/mo
📍 Recommended: Garneau, Strathcona

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约73%，六年毕业率约80%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约86%
💼 能源行业（石油天然气）、科技公司、政府部门
🌟 AI领域强势，Edmonton是加拿大AI研究重镇
employment.en:
📊 ~86% employed within 6 months
💼 Energy sector (oil & gas), tech companies, government
🌟 Strong AI presence; Edmonton is a Canadian AI research hub

healthcare.zh: ✅ 阿省国际学生可加入AHCIP，享受与本地居民相同的基本医疗保障。无需额外购买基本医疗保险。
healthcare.en: ✅ Alberta international students eligible for AHCIP, same basic coverage as residents. No additional basic insurance needed.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接通过UAlberta官网申请
📅 截止日期：3月1日
💰 申请费：C$125
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly via UAlberta website
📅 Deadline: March 1
💰 Fee: C$125
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency

city.zh: 安大略省 渥太华

majorTuition.zh:
渥太华大学国际生学费：
• 文科/社科：C$35,000/年
• 理科：C$40,000/年
• 商学(Telfer)：C$48,000/年
• 工程/CS：C$55,000/年
majorTuition.en:
U of Ottawa international tuition:
• Arts/Social Sciences: C$35,000/yr
• Science: C$40,000/yr
• Commerce (Telfer): C$48,000/yr
• Engineering/CS: C$55,000/yr

desc.zh: 全球最大的英法双语大学，位于加拿大首都渥太华。靠近国会山和联邦政府机构，政治学、法学和公共政策专业优势突出。Co-op项目与政府合作紧密。
desc.en: The world's largest English-French bilingual university, in Canada's capital Ottawa. Near Parliament Hill. Strong in political science, law, and public policy. Co-op programs closely tied to government.

safetyDetail.zh: 渥太华是加拿大首都，治安非常好。校园位于市中心Rideau运河旁，环境优美安全。
safetyDetail.en: Ottawa is Canada's capital with excellent safety. Campus alongside the Rideau Canal, beautiful and secure.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷（-15°C至-5°C），降雪量大。夏季温暖（20-26°C）。Rideau运河冬季结冰可滑冰。
climate.en: Cold winters (-15°C to -5°C) with heavy snow. Warm summers (20-26°C). Rideau Canal freezes for ice skating.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或安省省提名(OINP)申请永久居留。渥太华联邦政府就业机会丰富。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Ontario PNP (OINP). Ottawa has abundant federal government jobs.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$9,000-14,000/年
🏢 校外租房：渥太华租金中等，Studio约C$1,200-1,600/月
📍 推荐区域：Sandy Hill、Byward Market
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$9,000-14,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Ottawa moderate rents, studio ~C$1,200-1,600/mo
📍 Recommended: Sandy Hill, Byward Market

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约72%，六年毕业率约80%。提供英法双语学术支持。
graduationRate.en: 4-year graduation rate ~72%, 6-year rate ~80%. Bilingual academic support available.

employment.zh:

🌟 双语能力是就业加分项

💼 Federal government, international organizations, tech (Shopify HQ)
🌟 Bilingual skills are a major asset

healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP, ~C$756/yr. On-campus health services centre.

desc.zh: 位于加拿大能源之都卡尔加里的综合性研究型大学。能源工程、商学和运动学实力突出。毗邻落基山脉，户外活动丰富。阿省无省销售税。
desc.en: A comprehensive research university in Canada's energy capital. Strong in energy engineering, business, and kinesiology. Near the Rocky Mountains. Alberta has no provincial sales tax.

safetyDetail.zh: 卡尔加里连续多年被评为全球最宜居城市之一，治安良好。校园面积大，安保完善。
safetyDetail.en: Calgary consistently ranked among world's most livable cities. Large campus with comprehensive security.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷（-15°C至-5°C），但Chinook暖风可带来短暂升温。夏季凉爽干燥（15-23°C）。阳光充足。
climate.en: Cold winters (-15°C to -5°C) but Chinook winds bring brief warm spells. Cool, dry summers (15-23°C). Very sunny.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或阿省省提名(AINP)申请永久居留。卡尔加里能源和科技行业就业机会多。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Alberta PNP (AINP). Calgary has strong energy and tech jobs.

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$8,500-13,000/年
🏢 校外租房：卡尔加里租金适中，Studio约C$1,000-1,400/月
📍 推荐区域：University Heights、Brentwood

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约71%，六年毕业率约79%。

🌟 Haskayne商学院与能源行业联系紧密
employment.en:

🌟 Haskayne closely tied to energy industry

desc.en: Canada's most innovative university with the world's largest co-op program. CS and Engineering highly respected in North America; graduates work at top Silicon Valley companies. World-leading in math and actuarial science.

safetyDetail.zh: 滑铁卢是安静安全的大学城，治安良好。校园安保24小时运行，社区友好。
safetyDetail.en: Waterloo is a quiet, safe university town. 24/7 campus security and friendly community.

climate.zh: 四季分明，冬季寒冷（-10°C至-2°C），降雪较多。夏季温暖（18-26°C）。
climate.en: Four distinct seasons. Cold winters (-10°C to -2°C) with significant snow. Warm summers (18-26°C).

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或安省省提名(OINP)。Co-op期间也可合法工作，积累加拿大工作经验。

💼 硅谷科技巨头（Google、Meta、Apple）、华尔街
🌟 Co-op使学生毕业前即积累2年工作经验
employment.en:

💼 Silicon Valley (Google, Meta, Apple), Wall Street
🌟 Co-op provides ~2 years work experience before graduation

climate.en: Four distinct seasons. Cold winters (-8°C to -1°C) with moderate snow. Warm summers (19-26°C).

🌟 Alumni network particularly strong in finance and consulting

safetyDetail.en: Kingston is a very safe small city with a warm campus atmosphere. Excellent community safety; very walkable.

safetyDetail.en: Halifax is a friendly, safe port city of ~400K people. Safe campus with a warm community.

climate.en: Maritime climate. Cold winters (-8°C to 0°C) with significant snow. Cool summers (16-23°C). Higher humidity.

desc.en: A comprehensive research university in BC's capital Victoria, known for its co-op program (Canada's second largest). Beautiful campus with Canada's mildest climate. Strong in ocean science and clean energy.

safetyDetail.zh: 维多利亚是加拿大最安全的城市之一，治安极好。校园绿树环绕，环境宁静安全。
safetyDetail.en: Victoria is one of Canada's safest cities. Campus surrounded by greenery, quiet and secure environment.

climate.zh: 加拿大最温和的气候，冬季温和（3-8°C），极少降雪。夏季凉爽舒适（15-22°C）。全年适合户外活动。
climate.en: Canada's mildest climate. Mild winters (3-8°C) with rare snow. Cool summers (15-22°C). Year-round outdoor activities.

desc.zh: 北美最古老的法语大学之一，位于美丽的世界遗产城市魁北克城。林学、农学在加拿大名列前茅。校园是北美最大的大学校园之一。注意：法语授课。
desc.en: One of North America's oldest French-language universities, in the beautiful UNESCO World Heritage city of Quebec City. Top-ranked in forestry and agriculture. One of North America's largest campuses. Note: French instruction.

safetyDetail.zh: 魁北克城是加拿大最安全的城市之一，犯罪率极低。校园宽广安全，社区友好。
safetyDetail.en: Quebec City is one of Canada's safest cities with very low crime rates. Spacious, safe campus with a friendly community.

climate.zh: 冬季漫长寒冷（-18°C至-7°C），降雪量非常大。夏季温暖宜人（18-25°C）。需要专业防寒装备。
climate.en: Long, cold winters (-18°C to -7°C) with very heavy snowfall. Pleasant warm summers (18-25°C). Professional winter gear essential.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或魁省PEQ项目申请永久居留。法语授课学生在PEQ移民中有显著优势。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Quebec PEQ. French-instruction students have significant advantage for PEQ.

🌟 French proficiency is essential in Quebec job market

desc.zh: 西加拿大最古老的大学，位于曼尼托巴省首府温尼伯。工程学和农学研究实力强劲，生活成本是加拿大主要大学城中最低的之一。曼省移民政策对留学生非常友好。
desc.en: Western Canada's oldest university, in Manitoba's capital Winnipeg. Strong engineering and agriculture research. Among the lowest living costs of major Canadian university cities. Manitoba has very immigrant-friendly policies.

safetyDetail.zh: 温尼伯部分区域治安需注意，但校园安保完善。建议避免深夜独行于市中心某些区域。
safetyDetail.en: Some Winnipeg areas require caution, but campus security is comprehensive. Avoid walking alone late at night in certain downtown areas.

climate.zh: 冬季极寒（-25°C至-12°C），是加拿大最冷的大城市之一。夏季温暖（17-26°C）。需要最高级别的防寒装备。
climate.en: Extremely cold winters (-25°C to -12°C), one of Canada's coldest major cities. Warm summers (17-26°C). Top-tier winter gear essential.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或曼省省提名(MPNP)申请永久居留。MPNP是加拿大最友好的省提名项目之一，毕业即可申请。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Manitoba PNP (MPNP). MPNP is one of Canada's most accessible provincial nomination programs.

🏢 校外租房：温尼伯租金极低，Studio约C$800-1,200/月

employment.en:

🌟 MPNP makes Manitoba one of easiest provinces for student immigration

desc.en: A comprehensive research university in Canada's prairie province, home to the Canadian Light Source (CLS) synchrotron. Globally known for agriculture, veterinary medicine, and water resources. Very low living costs; scenic riverside campus.

climate.en: Extremely cold winters (-25°C to -12°C), among Canada's coldest. Warm, dry summers (16-25°C). Very sunny.

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约63%，六年毕业率约72%。

employment.en:

desc.en: Montreal's English-language comprehensive university, known for art & design, film production, and game design. JMSB business school is AACSB-accredited. Two campuses: downtown and west end.

desc.en: An applied university in downtown Toronto known for entrepreneurship. One of Canada's largest undergraduate business schools. Strong in journalism and creative industries. Campus in Toronto's busiest area with abundant internship opportunities.

desc.zh: 位于加拿大首都渥太华的综合性大学，以工程、计算机科学、国际事务和新闻专业闻名。与联邦政府和科技行业联系紧密，Co-op项目优秀。校园沿Rideau运河而建，环境优美。
desc.en: A comprehensive university in Canada's capital Ottawa, known for engineering, CS, international affairs, and journalism. Strong ties to federal government and tech sector. Excellent co-op programs. Beautiful campus along the Rideau Canal.

safetyDetail.zh: 渥太华是加拿大首都，治安非常好。校园沿运河而建，环境安静安全。
safetyDetail.en: Ottawa is Canada's capital with excellent safety. Campus along the canal, quiet and secure environment.

climate.zh: 冬季寒冷（-15°C至-5°C），降雪量大。夏季温暖（20-26°C）。校园地下通道系统可避寒。
climate.en: Cold winters (-15°C to -5°C) with heavy snow. Warm summers (20-26°C). Campus underground tunnel system helps beat the cold.

visa.zh: Study Permit → PGWP（最长3年）→ Express Entry或安省省提名(OINP)申请永久居留。
visa.en: Study Permit → PGWP (up to 3 years) → PR via Express Entry or Ontario PNP (OINP).

housing.zh:
🏠 校内宿舍：大一保证住宿，约C$9,500-14,000/年
🏢 校外租房：渥太华租金中等，Studio约C$1,200-1,600/月
📍 推荐区域：Old Ottawa South、Glebe
housing.en:
🏠 On-campus: Guaranteed for first year, ~C$9,500-14,000/yr
🏢 Off-campus: Ottawa moderate rents, studio ~C$1,200-1,600/mo
📍 Recommended: Old Ottawa South, Glebe

graduationRate.zh: 本科四年毕业率约68%，六年毕业率约76%。

employment.zh:
📊 毕业6个月内就业率约85%
💼 联邦政府、科技公司（Shopify、BlackBerry QNX）、国防产业
🌟 Co-op项目与政府和科技行业合作广泛
employment.en:
📊 ~85% employed within 6 months
💼 Federal government, tech (Shopify, BlackBerry QNX), defence
🌟 Co-op programs with extensive government and tech partnerships

healthcare.zh: ✅ 安省国际学生需购买UHIP，约C$756/年。校内有健康服务中心。
healthcare.en: ✅ Ontario international students must enroll in UHIP, ~C$756/yr. On-campus Health Services.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：OUAC 105通道
📅 截止日期：4月1日
💰 申请费：C$150
📝 所需材料：高中成绩单、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: OUAC Stream 105
📅 Deadline: April 1
💰 Fee: C$150
📝 Materials: Transcripts, English proficiency
